top_signals.title: Gulf Oil Exports Briefly Recovered to Pre-War Levels Before Latest Escalation
top_signals.summary: Crude oil and condensate exports from the Persian Gulf rose to pre-war levels in the first half of July, data from Kpler and Vortexa shows, as cited by Reuters, reaching between 12 and 13.6 million barrels daily. The recovery is unlikely to last, however, as traffic via the Strait of Hormuz once again slows to a trickle amid the renewed hostilities between the United States and Iran. Oil and condensate flows out of Saudi Arabia, the UAE, Iraq, Iran, and Kuwait rose by 16% from June over the first two weeks of this month, the data showed. Kpler…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin ETFs see new money again, but inflows remain ‘peanuts’ relative to the recent exodus
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO goes for just under $1 million at Sotheby's auction
top_signals.summary: The high price for the garment is a sign that collectors are looking to bid on artifacts and collectibles from the artificial intelligence boom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with Small Business Bank and announces termination enforcement actions with BNP Paribas S.A., BNP Paribas USA, Inc., BNP Paribas Securities Corp., and Community Bankshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
